global.siteDescription: Stay updated with the latest sports news, match analysis, transfer updates, and trending stories from Kenya and around the world. Sports Arena delivers fast, reliable, and engaging sports coverage.

defaultSeo.metaTitle: Sports Arena — Independent Sports News, Stories, Analysis & Updates
defaultSeo.metaDescription: Get breaking sports news, match reports, transfer updates, and expert analysis covering local and international sports.
